title: Add dashboard_server.py to launch_all.py managed process list
objective: dashboard_server.py is currently started manually and has no PID guard, causing duplicate instances every time it is launched. Add it to the PROCESSES list in launch_all.py so the existing watchdog and singleton guard cover it.
inputs: launch_all.py — PROCESSES list (lines 20-33). Currently contains two entries: shadow_engine and bot_core.
launch_all.py — SPORTS_BOT_DIR is already defined as Path(__file__).resolve().parent
launch_all.py — LOG_DIR is already defined as SPORTS_BOT_DIR / 'logs'
deliverables: Add a third entry to the PROCESSES list for dashboard_server.
acceptance_criteria: PROCESSES list has exactly 3 entries: shadow_engine, bot_core, dashboard
Running python launch_all.py starts all three child processes
dashboard_server.py starts as a child of the launcher
Running python launch_all.py a second time while the first is running prints the ERROR: launcher already running message and exits
verification: Expected output includes: LAUNCHER: shadow_engine started, LAUNCHER: bot_core started, LAUNCHER: dashboard started
Second terminal: python launch_all.py — must print ERROR: launcher already running
